text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Breaking through the last 1,200 meters, Sakura
Bakushin O trembles with delight at winning all
three races.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
On the way back home, I propose a new goal. In
order to test the extent of her newfound growth, I
ask Sakura Bakushin O to race against Nishino
Flower in the Sprinters Stakes.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Sakura Bakushin O has been looking forward to a
rematch with Nishino Flower, so she accepts.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Nonetheless, she doesn't fail to stress that this
will be the last time she enters the Sprinters
Stakes.
